cb_step_1.title: Select Pelvic Volume
cb_step_1.instruction: Choose the Pelvic Volume from the dropdown.

cb_step_4.title: Exclude Fragments
cb_step_4.instruction: Untick segments to exclude from planning.

cb_step_8.title: Adjust Fragment?
cb_step_8.instruction: Tick the checkbox to manually adjust a fragment, or skip to next step.

cb_step_10.title: Adjust Fragment Position
cb_step_10.instruction: Use transform controls to adjust position and rotation.

cb_step_13.title: Edit Screw Trajectories?
cb_step_13.instruction: Tick checkbox to edit screw trajectories, or finish.

cb_step_14.title: Adjust Screw Trajectories
cb_step_14.instruction: Use transform controls to adjust position and rotation.

cb_step_16.title: Disable Edit Mode
cb_step_16.instruction: Untick the checkbox to exit screw edit mode.

operation_descriptions: Segment the pelvis from the input CT volume
Segment fractures from the CT volume using pelvis segmentation
Generate template models from the pelvis segmentation
Register and reduce fracture fragments relative to pelvis template (first run)
Register and reduce fracture fragments relative to pelvis template (second run)
Select the fragment to adjust via the fragment selector
Manually adjust the position and rotation of the selected fragment.
Apply the manual adjustment to the fragment reduction
Plan screw trajectories for reduced fragments
Manually adjust the position and rotation of the screw trajectories.
Regenerate screw model nodes from edited trajectories
Deselect the edit screws checkbox to finalize

ground_api_evidence_note: ground_api_evidence is pre-revision retrieval evidence; final_api_evidence reflects the current validated templates.
